name: PICV Large Caliber Pressure Independent Valve
desc: Large caliber PICV with integrated ultrasonic flow meter, temperature sensor, smart valve control, and 4G/RS485 for intelligent building energy management.
overview: The PICV-L Large Caliber PICV Energy Valve is designed for AHU, primary chiller plant and main distribution pipework. Integrates Class 2 ultrasonic flow measurement, dual temperature sensors and precision electric valve control in one device. Remote valve control and real-time energy monitoring via 4G or RS485. IP68 for plant room environments.
features: Class 2 ultrasonic flow measurement: wide turndown ratio, unaffected by water quality, no moving parts, zero maintenance
High-quality piezoelectric chip and dedicated microprocessor: low power, high EMI resistance, stable long-term accuracy
38,000 mAh battery with >6 year life — wireless plant-room installation without power cable
Ball valve + large-torque actuator (120 N·m, 33,100:1 gear ratio): reliable high-force operation on large-bore pipes
Auto self-flushing prevents scale accumulation and clogging inside the valve
Dual 4G / RS485 communication for flexible integration with any BMS or energy management platform
Manual operation override available during power failure — full mechanical backup
